g.text: The conversion is the shunting-yard algorithm:
and the resulting postfix list is evaluated with a value stack.
readToken() consumes one token from the front of the input string
and returns the token plus the remaining substring.
Abstract behavior shared by arithmetic operators.
Concrete subclasses provide the symbol, priority, and evaluation rule.
Parentheses do not carry state, so one shared instance is enough.
Parentheses do not carry state, so one shared instance is enough.
- Shunting-yard for infix to postfix conversion
